title: Senior Software Engineer - PhonePe South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - PhonePe South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
PhonePe South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About PhonePe South Asia Partners:
PhonePe South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe South Asia Partners!
